title: Regional Product Marketing Specialist (f/m/d)

We are looking for a highly skilled and motivated Regional Marketing Specialist (m/f/d) to join our team and drive our market presence in Europe and at “to be defined” global accounts.



This individual will be in our Munich sales office (Aschheim) and will collaborate with the Regional Marketing team and cross-functional teams within the Standard Products Division to execute marketing strategies tailored to specific regional markets.



The position involves executing campaigns, conducting market research, analyzing market trends, and coordinating efforts to help drive brand awareness, customer engagement, and sales growth.



The Regional Marketing Specialist (m/f/d) will work in a dynamic, team-oriented environment with opportunities for learning and growth

description_full:
Job Description



We are looking for a highly skilled and motivated Regional Marketing Specialist (m/f/d) to join our team and drive our market presence in Europe and at “to be defined” global accounts.



This individual will be in our Munich sales office (Aschheim) and will collaborate with the Regional Marketing team and cross-functional teams within the Standard Products Division to execute marketing strategies tailored to specific regional markets.



The position involves executing campaigns, conducting market research, analyzing market trends, and coordinating efforts to help drive brand awareness, customer engagement, and sales growth.



The Regional Marketing Specialist (m/f/d) will work in a dynamic, team-oriented environment with opportunities for learning and growth



This Regional Marketing role offers the opportunity to gain hands-on experience in a fast-paced, high-impact area of the business, while contributing to the success of regional marketing initiatives.



Key Responsibilities:



Strategic Product Marketing & Planning:



Develop and execute regional marketing strategies aligned with product, program, and business objectives
Conduct market research and competitive analysis to identify growth opportunities and inform strategic positioning
Monitor competitor activities and market trends to maintain competitive advantage

Demand Generation & Sales Enablement:



Drive demand generation and deliver high-quality marketing qualified leads through tactical campaigns for new and existing portfolio products and market segments
Support sales teams with technical expertise, customer relationship management for new and existing customers, and territory development with current products
Participate in business negotiations to capture new opportunities and maximize profitability, providing feedback to the Division

Content & Communications:



Develop, maintain, and organize marketing content for internal teams (Sales, Distribution, and Management) and customer engagement initiatives
Ensure all content is current and aligned with sales and distribution needs

Cross-Functional Collaboration:



Partner with Sales, Distribution, Product Marketing, Planning, and Customer Service teams to ensure customer success and revenue targets
Provide technical support and application guidance to Sales and Distribution partners
Collaborate with Product Marketing Managers to maintain competitive market positioning and pricing strategies

 





Qualifications



Qualifications & Skills:



Bachelor’s degree in Electrical Engineering or some other technical discipline
At least 3-5 years of experience in technical marketing, preferably in a regional or local marketing role
Experience with CRM Tools
Strong verbal and written communication skills in German and English. Other languages are a plus.
Proficient in Microsoft Office Suite (Excel, PowerPoint, Word)
Ability to work collaboratively in a fast-paced environment
Strong attention to detail and organizational skills
Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously and meet deadlines
Creative mindset with the ability to adapt marketing materials to regional needs
Occasional travel required for regional events or other activities

Key Attributes:



Adaptability: Able to quickly pivot in response to changing market conditions and company priorities
Team-Oriented: Works effectively in a team environment, collaborating with cross-functional departments
Proactive: Takes initiative to identify opportunities and drive projects forward with minimal supervision
Customer-Focused: Understands the needs and preferences of the regional customer base and tailors marketing strategies accordingly


Additional Information
